roa.docketEntryComment: PITCHSS IN CAMERA HRG CNDCTD BY JUD CROMPTON ON 7-30-15,CSR M LYONS#6840PTICHESS PROTECTIVE ORDER SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S EC1043 PITCHESS DISCOVERY MOT, P&A FILED
DEFT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED

/CAL PRELIM HRG & MTS/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINTO ADD COUNT 1, HS 11350(A), A FELONY GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MTS/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO VACATE TODAY'SPRELIMINARY HEARING/BE/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/

/CAL:1043EC (PITCHESS) MOTION/NP/X: RONNI WAGNER IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,/X:THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A STIPULATION,THE WRITTEN STIPULATION IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:POLICE LEGAL SHALL DELIVER RELEVANT MATERIALS TO THE COURT FORREVIEW BY 07-29-15; MATERIALS,IF ANY, SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENSE BY 08-12-15,/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/BAIL:25100/CTORD:BOND IS NOT EXONERATED ATTHIS TIME/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG, DEF MOTION MTS & DEFT MOTION TO CONTINUE, /X:MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED/STWPX/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING& MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 06-22-15/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
